title: ContentBlob
description: A content blob reference from the Office 365 Management Activity API representing aggregated audit actions and events available for retrieval.

contentType.description: The content type of the blob.

contentId.description: An opaque string that uniquely identifies the content.

contentUri.description: The URL to use when retrieving the content.

contentCreated.description: The datetime when the content was made available.

contentExpiration.description: The datetime after which the content will no longer be available for retrieval.
